TextView.android:text:
Daily Meditation Guide

1. Deep Breathing
Focus on slow, deep inhales and exhales.

2. Body Scan
Slowly move your attention through each part of your body.

3. Mindful Walking
Pay attention to the sensation of your feet hitting the ground.

4. Loving-Kindness
Direct positive energy and well-wishes toward yourself and others.

5. Zen Meditation
Sit in a quiet space and observe thoughts without judgment.

6. Guided Visualization
Imagine a peaceful place like a forest or a beach.

7. Mantra Meditation
Repeat a calming word or phrase silently to stay focused.

8. Gratitude Practice
Think of three things you are thankful for today.

9. Sound Bath
Listen to calming nature sounds or singing bowls.

10. Box Breathing
Inhale, hold, exhale, and hold for 4 seconds each.
